=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (9:40-9:49) TS377096: This generator applies `Effect.orDie` to every yielded effect. Hoist it once to the generator result: `Effect.gen(...).pipe(Effect.orDie)`, or `Effect.fn(function*(){ ... }, Effect.orDie)`. effect(redundantOrDie)
  Fix 0: "Disable redundantOrDie for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable redundantOrDie for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable redundantOrDie for this line"

  Fix 0: "Disable redundantOrDie for this line"
